creator: alex@dnb.nu
text:
I installed a system with a minimal setup, configured everything and
updated the system using freebsd-update.

After a while i realized i didn't have the man pages, so i tried to
install them using sysinstall, but sysinstall couldn't find the
distribution. It was looking for the files in 6.2-RELEASE-p4, which of
course don't exist on the mirror.

Fix: 

In sysinstall; go to the options menu, change releasename from
6.2-RELEASE-pX to 6.2-RELEASE
How-To-Repeat: 1) update system using freebsd-update
2) try to install any distribution using sysinstall
